76277.subject: 📈 Bitcoin surges past $66K
76277.body:
Today’s newsletter is brought to you by **[Choose Rich Live](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**[!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)

Our very own Nick O’Neill is has launched a new stream covering crypto, finance, AI, tech, and the stories shaping the internet economy.

If you already follow Nick, you know what to expect: sharp takes, market chaos, founder brain, and the occasional banger you’ll see clipped on the timeline five minutes later.

Episodes will be streaming live on YouTube, so make sure you’re subscribed to catch the next one as it happens.

**[Subscribe to Choose Rich Live!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**

———————————————————————————

## Top Stories

**BTC** $66,415 (3.0%) | **ETH** $1,936 (3.7%) | **SOL** $78 (2.3%)

* Bitcoin surpasses [$66K ](https://coinmarketcap.com/currencies/bitcoin/)for the first time since June 15

* Bitmine [adds $14M](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2079184276592222602?s=20) worth of Ethereum as spot ETH ETFs led all crypto ETFs in [weekly net inflows](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2079068925783105812?s=20)

* Mediators are negotiating a [10 day cease fire](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2079261822121857132?s=20) between US and Iran

* Hyperliquid adds support for [HIP-4 prediction market creation](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2079056881440739826?s=20) to those with 500k staked HYPE

* Bitcoin miners Hut 8 and Iren [pivot to AI](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2079231844600643790?s=20) contracts

* Former NY Governor Andrew Cuomo joins [OKX’s board](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2079162109947240463?s=20) — NYSE partners with OKX to [tokenize stocks](https://x.com/coinbureau/status/2079295278843351548?s=20)

* Polymarket refers [100 suspicious wallets](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2079389757231251823?s=20) to law enforcement

* Robinhood opens access to [AI agent accounts](https://x.com/RobinhoodApp/status/2079195918595764300?s=20)

* Google announces new [“Frozen” chip](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2079198142218588589?s=20) to power its AI models

———————————————————————————


———

You are reading a plain text version of this post. For the best experience, copy and paste this link in your browser to view the post online:
https://www.dailybones.com/p/bitcoin-surges-past-66k

76274.subject: Повідомлення про конвертацію видалених токенів - 2026-07-21 12:50:25 (UTC)
76274.body: #outlook a { padding:0; } body { margin:0; padding:0; -webkit-text-size-adjust:100%; -ms-text-size-adjust:100%; } table, td { border-collapse:collapse; mso-table-lspace:0pt; mso-table-rspace:0pt; } img { border:0; height:auto; line-height:100%; outline:none; text-decoration:none; -ms-interpolation-mode:bicubic; } p { display:block; margin:13px 0; } 96 .mj-outlook-group-fix { width:100% !important; } @media only screen and (min-width:480px) { .mj-column-per-100 { width:100% !important; max-width: 100%; } .mj-column-per-25 { width:25% !important; max-width: 25%; } .mj-column-per-50 { width:50% !important; max-width: 50%; } } .moz-text-html .mj-column-per-100 { width:100% !important; max-width: 100%; } .moz-text-html .mj-column-per-25 { width:25% !important; max-width: 25%; } .moz-text-html .mj-column-per-50 { width:50% !important; max-width: 50%; } @media only screen and (max-width:480px) { table.mj-full-width-mobile { width: 100% !important; } td.mj-full-width-mobile { width: auto !important; } } :root { color-scheme: light !important; supported-color-schemes: light !important; } @media only screen and (min-width:480px) { body:not(.gjs-dashed) .hidden-desktop { display: none !important; } div.mj-group-full-width { width: 100% !important; max-width: 100% !important; } } @media only screen and (max-width:480px) { body:not(.gjs-dashed) .hidden-mobile { display: none !important; } } Повідомлення про конвертацію видалених токенів Шановний користувачу Binance!   Binance виконає конвертацію RDNT у USDC на основі балансу ваших активів в акаунті Binance о 2026-07-23 03:00:00 UTC . Конвертація буде завершена, і сума в еквіваленті USDC буде зарахована на ваш акаунт Binance до 2027-01-23 03:00:00 UTC .   Про конвертацію   Конвертація буде виконана на основі середнього обмінного курсу RDNT до USDC у період з 2026-07-23 03:00:00 UTC і 2027-01-23 03:00:00 UTC (далі — "Період конвертації"). Зверніть увагу, що Binance надішле окреме сповіщення всім користувачам, на яких вплине конвертація RDNT у USDC, після її завершення.   Додаткова інформація про середній курс обміну протягом періоду конвертації також буде надана в повідомленні.   Примітки: Ви отримали цей електронний лист, оскільки наразі на балансі вашого акаунту Binance є токени RDNT. Депозити RDNT більше не підтримуються і не будуть зараховані. Протягом періоду конвертації користувачі не зможуть переглядати баланси своїх токенів RDNT у своїх акаунтах Binance. Конвертація RDNT у USDC буде недоступна для користувачів, які знаходяться, зареєстровані або іншим чином перебувають в юрисдикціях, зазначених у Розділі (ii) Списку заборонених країн, визначеного в Умовах користування Binance. Цей електронний лист може бути перекладений іншою мовою, крім англійської. У разі невідповідності, двозначності або пропуску переважну силу матиме текст цього електронного листа англійською мовою.   Дякуємо за вашу підтримку! Команда Binance       Залишайтеся на зв’язку! Щоб

76273.subject: Why Your AI Agent Isn't Actually an Agent (And What's Missing)
76273.body:
Ment Tech | Meant To Innovate

Автор: Ment Tech Labs


Автор: Ment Tech Labs

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/why-your-ai-agent-isnt-actually-whats-missing-menttechlabs-rqloc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BKCExkP6JRFmQ3%2FqZ0MetGg%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1WG_NE0oFlSYk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mrun1q95~wm-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrun1q95-wm
  
Open ten "AI agent" product pages this week. Nine of them are chatbots with a system prompt, a nice UI, and a name that ends in "AI". It answers a question, maybe calls one API, and stops. That's not an agent. That's autocomplete with a job title. As an AI agent development company, we build these systems for a living, so we see the gap up close: the distance between what gets demoed on a sales call and what actually survives a Tuesday morning in production, with real users, real edge cases, and a real API bill. Most of what's marketed today as AI agent development services is really chatbot development with a rebrand, and most of the AI agent platforms built on top of it inherit the same one-shot limitation. Here's what that gap actually looks like and what separates the two. The One-Shot Problem A real agent doesn't just respond. It decides what to do next. Most "agents" on the market today do a single pass: read input, generate output, and are done. No memory of the last 5 things the user asked about. No ability to say "I need more information before I answer that." No sense of whether the task actually got completed. A production agent runs a loop: plan, act, check the result, adjust, and act again until the task is actually finished, not until the model has produced a plausible-sounding response. That loop is the entire difference between a chatbot and an agent. Everything else is branding. Three Questions That Actually Separate the Two If you're evaluating an "AI agent", yours or a vendor's, these are the questions that matter more than any demo: 1. Does it remember? Not "Does it have a long context window?" Does it retain relevant state across sessions, so a returning user isn't starting from zero every time? Memory is what turns a tool into an assistant. 2. Can it actually do things, or does it just talk about them? Real tool access checking a database, sending an email, updating a CRM, calling an internal system is what makes an agent useful instead of conversational. This is where MCP (Model Context Protocol) has quietly become the standard worth paying attention to in 2026: it's the plumbing that lets an agent connect to your actual tools and data sources without a custom integration for every single one. If a vendor can't explain how their agent connects to your systems, it's a chat window, not an agent.

Fear and Greed is at
39
(Fear)
and Bitcoin is at
$66K.
Bitcoin broke above $66K overnight, its highest level in over a
month, as improving macro sentiment and options positioning ahead
of the July 29 Fed decision lifted prices.

The mood is shifting. But the week's real stories are
structural. A major African nation just formalised crypto
regulation. Strategy stopped buying Bitcoin and started selling
stock instead. And a trillion-dollar asset manager is betting
prediction markets overtake crypto trading revenue.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

Strategy Stopped Buying Bitcoin and Sold Stock Instead

Strategy did not purchase any Bitcoin last week, instead
selling 2.7 million MSTR shares for approximately $263.5 million
to build its cash reserve to $3.23 billion. The company's 843,775
BTC position sits roughly $9 billion underwater at current
prices.

On Sunday, Saylor posted his tracker chart captioned "What's
next?" ahead of today's session.

At what Bitcoin price does Strategy's CEO say debt becomes a
concern?

Read More  
( https://link.coinmarketcap.com/f/a/aUYaqWPDvF_AOo-Rm_crcA~~/AAQRxRA~/5grBv6ut9VyI7iklRqS7y8TSlWZVRt3h0EAmhdBWqsNoWhqDGFTYCU8XrcMwQUS1IxOZYYwSmUsN9S40hwaTFaD1P9hQu5bANPpkSuykrhn_w81PiRxet1lBdQJi9xNU2ygAnDHJX0h13CDIfwF8QgyzHjvcE3iLxopMuKZRbRbs44Fz3ZVWggMJpfEI7ZxymACdejMP0imup9kekLuR7g~~ )
   Bitmine Is Now Earning Hundreds of Millions From Staking ET
